rel=\"stylesheet\">\n<style>\n  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\n\n  body {\n    width: 1200px;\n    height: 630px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;\n  }\n\n  .banner {\n    width: 1200px;\n    height: 630px;\n    background: #FAF9F6;\n    position: relative;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    overflow: hidden;\n  }\n\n  /* Warm radial glow top-left */\n  .banner::before {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    top: -120px;\n    left: -100px;\n    width: 700px;\n    height: 700px;\n    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.15) 0%, rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.05) 40%, transparent 70%);\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n\n  /* Sage glow bottom-right */\n  .banner::after {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    bottom: -150px;\n    right: -100px;\n    width: 600px;\n    height: 600px;\n    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(138, 158, 122, 0.12) 0%, rgba(138, 158, 122, 0.04) 40%, transparent 70%);\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n\n  /* Subtle diagonal lines texture */\n  .texture {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 0;\n    opacity: 0.03;\n    background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(\n      45deg,\n      #1A1612 0px,\n      #1A1612 1px,\n      transparent 1px,\n      transparent 20px\n    );\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n\n  /* Decorative pen illustration top-right */\n  .pen-deco {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 50px;\n    right: 80px;\n    width: 120px;\n    height: 120px;\n    opacity: 0.08;\n  }\n\n  .pen-deco svg {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 100%;\n  }\n\n  /* Decorative quotes bottom-left */\n  .quote-deco {\n    position: absolute;\n    bottom: 55px;\n    left: 75px;\n    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;\n    font-size: 160px;\n    color: #C4943E;\n    opacity: 0.08;\n    line-height: 1;\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n\n  /* Decorative horizontal rule elements */\n  .rule-top, .rule-bottom {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 50%;\n    transform: translateX(-50%);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 16px;\n  }\n\n  .rule-top { top: 42px; }\n  .rule-bottom { bottom: 42px; }\n\n  .rule-line {\n    width: 160px;\n    height: 1px;\n    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(196, 148, 62, 0.3), transparent);\n  }\n\n  .rule-dot {\n    width: 5px;\n    height: 5px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: rgba(196, 148, 62, 0.25);\n  }\n\n  /* Main content */\n  .content {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 2;\n    text-align: center;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0;\n  }\n\n  /* Logo icon */\n  .logo-icon {\n    width: 56px;\n    height: 56px;\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C4943E, #D4A853);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    margin-bottom: 28px;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(196, 148, 62, 0.25);\n  }\n\n  .logo-icon svg {\n    width: 32px;\n    height: 32px;\n  }\n\n  /* Brand name */\n  .brand {\n    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;\n    font-size: 82px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: #1A1612;\n    letter-spacing: -1px;\n    line-height: 1;\n    margin-bottom: 18px;\n  }\n\n  /* Tagline */\n  .tagline {\n    font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;\n    font-size: 24px;\n    font-weight: 400;\n    color: #6B6560;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    margin-bottom: 36px;\n  }\n\n  /* Feature pills */\n  .pills {\n    display: flex;\n    gap: 12px;\n  }\n\n  .pill {\n    padding: 10px 22px;\n    border-radius: 100px;\n    font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;\n    font-size: 15px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px;\n  }\n\n  .pill-amber {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(196, 148, 62, 0.12), rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.08));\n    color: #9A7530;\n    border: 1px solid rgba(196, 148, 62, 0.2);\n  }\n\n  .pill-sage {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(138, 158, 122, 0.12), rgba(138, 158, 122, 0.06));\n    color: #5C7350;\n    border: 1px solid rgba(138, 158, 122, 0.2);\n  }\n\n  .pill-warm {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(180, 130, 70, 0.1), rgba(160, 120, 60, 0.06));\n    color: #8B6B3D;\n    border: 1px solid rgba(180, 130, 70, 0.18);\n  }\n\n  /* URL at bottom */\n  .url {\n    position: absolute;\n    bottom: 70px;\n    left: 50%;\n    transform: translateX(-50%);\n    font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;\n    font-size: 16px;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #A8A29E;\n    letter-spacing: 1.5px;\n    z-index: 2;\n  }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div class=\"banner\">\n    <div class=\"texture\"></div>\n\n    <!-- rel=\"stylesheet\">\n<style>\n  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }\n\n  body {\n    width: 1200px;\n    height: 630px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;\n  }\n\n  .banner {\n    width: 1200px;\n    height: 630px;\n    background: #FAF9F6;\n    position: relative;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    overflow: hidden;\n  }\n\n  /* Warm radial glow top-left */\n  .banner::before {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    top: -120px;\n    left: -100px;\n    width: 700px;\n    height: 700px;\n    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.15) 0%, rgba(212, 168, 83, 0.05) 40%, transparent 70%);\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n\n  /* Sage glow bottom-right */\n  .banner::after {\n    content: '';\n    position: absolute;\n    bottom: -150px;\n    right: -100px;\n    width: 600px;\n    height: 600px;\n    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(138, 158, 122, 0.12) 0%, rgba(138, 158, 122, 0.04) 40%, transparent 70%);\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n\n  /* Subtle diagonal lines texture */\n  .texture {\n    position: absolute;\n    inset: 0;\n    opacity: 0.03;\n    background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(\n      45deg,\n      #1A1612 0px,\n      #1A1612 1px,\n      transparent 1px,\n      transparent 20px\n    );\n    pointer-events: none;\n  }\n\n  /* Decorative pen illustration top-right */\n  .pen-deco {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 50px;\n    right: 80px;\n    width: 120px;\n    height: 120px;\n    opacity: 0.08;\n  }\n\n  .pen-deco svg {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 100%;\n  }\n\n  /* Decorative quotes bottom-left */\n  .quote-deco {\n    position: absolute;\n    bottom: 55px;\n    left: 75px;\n    font-family: .rule-top, .rule-bottom {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 50%;\n    transform: translateX(-50%);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 16px;\n  }\n\n  .rule-top { top: 42px; }\n  .rule-bottom { bottom: 42px; }\n\n  .rule-line {\n    width: 160px;\n    height: 1px;\n    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(196, 148, 62, 0.3), transparent);\n  }\n\n  .rule-dot {\n    width: 5px;\n    height: 5px;\n    border-radius: 50%;\n    background: rgba(196, 148, 62, 0.25);\n  }\n\n  /* Main content */\n  .content {\n    position: relative;\n    z-index: 2;\n    text-align: center;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 0;\n  }\n\n  /* Logo icon */\n  .logo-icon {\n    width: 56px;\n    height: 56px;\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C4943E, #D4A853);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    margin-bottom: 28px;\n    box-shadow: 82px;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: #1A1612;\n    letter-spacing: -1px;\n    line-height: 1;\n    margin-bottom: 18px;\n  }\n\n  /* Tagline */\n  .tagline {\n    font-family: 'Outfit',
